title: languas subfusicarpa
intro: Languas subfusicarpa, also known as Lesser Galangal, is a type of plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lesser Galangal include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Lesser Galangal can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in cooking as a spice to add flavor and aroma to various dishes.
